title: Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 open beta will take place from August 28 to September 1
summary: Activision confirms multiplayer beta dates without early access for Game Pass subscribers, as debate over movement speed intensifies after the game's debut.

title: RAM crisis intensifies: Valve warns prices continue to rise
summary: Global chip shortage affects everything from Steam Machines production to retro hardware, with no signs of improvement in the short term, according to various industry sources.

title: Game of Thrones strategy game delayed until 2027 to polish quality
summary: War for Westeros, the RTS based on the HBO series, postpones its release to meet fan expectations.

title: Kingdom Hearts Missing-Link canceled and leaked images may hint at Kingdom Hearts IV
summary: Leaked cinematics from the canceled mobile project spark theories among series fans.

title: Christopher Nolan compares AI to a Trojan horse during The Odyssey promotion
summary: The director warns about the risks of artificial intelligence, as fans travel long distances to watch the movie in the desired format and connections to Dune are revealed.

title: Call of Duty movie's historical setting revealed
summary: Activision confirms the context of the film adaptation, a choice that has surprised series fans.

title: Judge temporarily blocks Paramount and Warner Bros. merger
summary: A judge issues an order halting the studios' merger, creating a new legal obstacle for the deal.

title: First trailer released for Avengers: Doomsday featuring Robert Downey Jr. as Doctor Doom
summary: Marvel releases the trailer for its new film, showing the Avengers facing a cosmic threat and generating mixed reactions on social media.

title: Unofficial Gears of War 2 PC port emerges from a 2008 leak
summary: A fan manages to free the game from Xbox 360 exclusivity thanks to a leaked version that had remained hidden for 18 years.

title: Cliff Bleszinski reflects on his career and battle with alcoholism
summary: The creator of Gears of War reflects on his years as a developer and his future in the industry after overcoming addiction.

title: Todd Howard, professional Reddit 'lurker', reappears to thank fans for support
summary: The Bethesda director admits he gets ideas from the site and actively follows community discussions after the Fallout and The Elder Scrolls announcements.

title: British chain GAME enters administration with £16 million debt
summary: The video game retailer closes its doors due to tough competition, changes in consumer habits, and uncertainty caused by Brexit.

title: The Mermaid's Mask raves as one of the best games of 2026
summary: The stylized mystery for Switch 2 is praised for its narrative and design, becoming one of the highest-rated titles of the year.

title: Midgar Studio, creator of Edge of Memories, liquidated by court order
summary: The studio failed to find a buyer and closes permanently, becoming another victim of Nacon's bankruptcy.

title: The Blood of Dawnwalker promises innovation and aligns with CD Projekt's philosophy
summary: The vampire RPG will offer continuous playthroughs and no DRM, following the model of The Witcher creators.

title: Neosphere of The Deep-blue Sky: Legacy reveals its remaster for Switch and PC
summary: Kogado Studio relaunches the classic RPG with updated graphics and additional content.

title: Xbox reinforces its commitment to console exclusives
summary: Microsoft executives explain what makes a game exclusive and assure that players need reasons to buy an Xbox.
